company-law.name: Company Law
company-law.oneLiner: Formation, management & dissolution of companies under Companies Act 2013

priorities.topic: Share Capital — Types, Transfer, Forfeiture, Redemption, Reduction
priorities.minAnswer: 5 types of capital (Authorized/Issued/Subscribed/Called-up/Paid-up) + Equity vs Preference + Transfer Sec 56 + Forfeiture + Reduction Sec 66
priorities.strategy: ONLY topic appearing every single year (100%). Fragmented across all sections.

priorities.topic: Foss v Harbottle — Majority Rule, Exceptions, Minority Protection
priorities.minAnswer: State rule + 5 exceptions (ultra vires, fraud, personal rights, special majority, just & equitable) + Edwards v Halliwell
priorities.strategy: Near-guaranteed Sec C 20-marker (88%). Always asked as exceptions.

priorities.topic: Doctrine of Indoor Management (Turquand Rule)
priorities.minAnswer: Define + Royal British Bank v Turquand facts + principle (outsiders protected) + 5 exceptions + contrast constructive notice

priorities.topic: Kinds of Companies — Private/Public/Govt/OPC/Foreign/Holding
priorities.minAnswer: Define each type with Sec 2 numbers: Private 2(68), Public 2(71), OPC 2(62), Govt 2(45), Foreign 2(42)
priorities.strategy: Free Sec A marks (75%). Always definitions.

priorities.topic: Lifting of Corporate Veil — Circumstances, Case Laws
priorities.minAnswer: Define corporate veil + 6 grounds (fraud, tax evasion, agency, improper conduct, enemy character) + Salomon + Gilford Motor + Lee v Lee's
priorities.strategy: Skipped 2025 — may return strongly. Always needs case laws.

priorities.topic: MOA — Meaning, Clauses, Contents + Distinguish MOA vs AOA
priorities.minAnswer: Define MOA + 6 clauses (name, office, objects, liability, capital, subscription) + AOA definition + 5-point distinction
priorities.strategy: Often combined as MOA vs AOA distinction question.

priorities.topic: Directors — Position, Powers, Duties, Appointment, Removal, Disqualification
priorities.minAnswer: Legal position (agent/trustee) + Sec 152 appointment + Sec 169 removal + Sec 166 duties + Sec 164 disqualification
priorities.strategy: Broadest topic — can come as powers OR duties OR appointment OR disqualification.

priorities.topic: Prospectus — Golden Rules, Mis-statement, Civil & Criminal Liability
priorities.minAnswer: Define Sec 2(70) + golden rules + civil liability Sec 35 + criminal liability Sec 34 + who is liable

priorities.topic: Company Meetings — Kinds (AGM, EGM, Board), Functions
priorities.minAnswer: 5 types + AGM provisions Sec 96 + EGM Sec 100 + Board meeting Sec 173

priorities.topic: Ultra Vires Doctrine + Ashbury Railway v Riche
priorities.minAnswer: Define + effects (void ab initio) + exceptions + Ashbury Railway case

priorities.topic: Debentures — Meaning, Kinds, Shareholder vs Debenture Holder
priorities.minAnswer: Definition + kinds (secured/unsecured, redeemable/irredeemable, convertible) + distinction from shares

priorities.topic: Company as Legal Person / Salomon v Salomon
priorities.minAnswer: Salomon case facts + separate legal entity principle + implications
priorities.strategy: Often merged with Corporate Veil questions.

priorities.topic: Winding Up — Meaning, Grounds, Voluntary vs Compulsory
priorities.minAnswer: Define + modes + grounds under Section 271 + just & equitable

goldenCases.name: LIC of India v Escorts Ltd (1985)
goldenCases.principle: Definitive Indian test for veil piercing + shareholder rights + EGM requisition + share transfer

goldenCases.name: Salomon v Salomon (1897)
goldenCases.principle: Company is separate legal person — even one-man company is distinct from members

goldenCases.name: Ashbury Railway v Riche (1875)
goldenCases.principle: Ultra vires = void ab initio — cannot be ratified even by all shareholders

goldenCases.name: Foss v Harbottle + Edwards v Halliwell (1843/1950)
goldenCases.principle: Proper plaintiff rule + exception for personal rights of members

labour-law.name: Labour & Industrial Law
labour-law.oneLiner: Trade unions, strikes, wages, compensation & maternity benefits under 5+ Acts

priorities.topic: Trade Union — Registration, Rights, Immunities, Outsiders, General Fund
priorities.minAnswer: Define Sec 2(h) + registration Sec 4-8 (min 7 members) + rights Sec 15-16 + immunities Sec 17-18 + outsiders role
priorities.strategy: 100% — appears EVERY year, often in MULTIPLE questions per paper.

priorities.topic: Retrenchment / Layoff / Closure — Definitions, Distinction, Sec 25-F/G/H
priorities.minAnswer: Layoff Sec 2(kkk) + Retrenchment Sec 2(oo) + distinction table + Sec 25-F conditions + Sec 25-G last-come-first-go
priorities.strategy: 88% — 'difference between layoff and retrenchment' is a favourite.

priorities.topic: Strike & Lockout — Meaning, Distinction, Legality, Constitutional Right
priorities.minAnswer: Strike Sec 2(q) + Lockout Sec 2(l) + distinction + Sec 22-24 illegality + B.R. Singh case (not fundamental right)
priorities.strategy: Classic 20-marker: 'Lockout is weapon of employers, strike of workers'

priorities.topic: Industrial Dispute — Definition, Scope, Individual vs Industrial, Workman
priorities.minAnswer: Sec 2(k) definition + essentials + individual vs industrial Sec 2A + workman Sec 2(s) + Bangalore Water Supply
priorities.strategy: Core conceptual topic with multiple angles.

priorities.topic: Workmen's Compensation Act 1923 — Employer Liability, Amount, Disablement
priorities.minAnswer: Scope + employer liability conditions (arising out of + in course of employment) + Sec 4 amount + disablement types + notional extension
priorities.strategy: Every year since 2019. Active hot streak.

priorities.topic: Payment of Wages Act 1936 — Objects, Deductions, Fixation, Factory vs Establishment
priorities.minAnswer: Wages Sec 2(vi) + authorised deductions Sec 7 (12 types) + time of payment Sec 5 + factory vs establishment
priorities.strategy: Every year since 2019. Section 7 deductions list is key.

priorities.topic: Maternity Benefit Act 1961 — Period, Penalty, Payment on Death
priorities.minAnswer: Eligibility + 26 weeks period + conditions (80 days in preceding 12 months) + penalty + death provision Sec 5(4)
priorities.strategy: Straightforward factual. Air India v Nergesh Meerza case.

priorities.topic: Collective Bargaining + Growth of Trade Unions in India
priorities.minAnswer: Define + process + importance + TU history (1918 Madras → AITUC 1920 → TU Act 1926)

priorities.topic: ID Act 1947 — Scope, Objects, Features + Sec 11-A Tribunal Powers
priorities.minAnswer: ID Act objectives + features + authorities + Sec 11-A discretionary power

priorities.topic: Evolution of Industrial Legislation in India — History
priorities.minAnswer: Factories Act 1881 → Trade Disputes 1929 → PW Act 1936 → ID Act 1947 → Labour Codes 2020

priorities.topic: EPF Act 1952 — Object, Contribution, Scheme
priorities.minAnswer: Object + contribution (employer + employee) + scheme relevance

priorities.topic: Industry Definition — Bangalore Water Supply Triple Test
priorities.minAnswer: Triple test: systematic activity + employer-employee cooperation + production of goods/services

goldenCases.name: Bangalore Water Supply v A. Rajappa (1978)
goldenCases.principle: Triple test for 'Industry' — redefined entire scope of ID Act 1947

goldenCases.name: Dimakuchi Tea Estate (1958) + Bombay Union of Journalists (1964)
goldenCases.principle: Individual dispute becomes industrial via TU espousal + strike as collective bargaining weapon

goldenCases.name: Air India v Nergesh Meerza (1981)
goldenCases.principle: Termination on pregnancy violates Art 14, 15, 16 — wrongful retrenchment

goldenCases.name: B.R. Singh v Union of India (1989)
goldenCases.principle: Strike is NOT fundamental right but legal right under statutory conditions

environmental-law.name: Environmental Law
environmental-law.oneLiner: Constitutional provisions, pollution control Acts & judicial activism for environment

priorities.topic: Constitutional Provisions — Art 48A, 51A(g), 21, DPSP for Environment
priorities.minAnswer: Art 48A (DPSP) + Art 51A(g) (duty) + Art 21 (right to clean environment) + Subhash Kumar case + MC Mehta cases

priorities.topic: Air Act 1981 — State Board, Industrial Plants, Penal Provisions
priorities.minAnswer: Objectives + State Board Sec 5 + powers Sec 17 + restrictions Sec 21 + penal provisions Sec 37-40

priorities.topic: Pollution Types — Air, Water, Noise, Soil + Global Effects
priorities.minAnswer: 6 types (air/water/noise/soil/thermal/radioactive) + causes + effects + ozone/greenhouse/acid rain

priorities.topic: Water Act 1974 — State/Joint Board, Central Lab, Sampling, Effluent
priorities.minAnswer: State Board + Joint Board Sec 13 + Central Lab Sec 51 + sampling Sec 21 + prohibition Sec 24 + penalties

priorities.topic: Indian Forest Act 1927 — Reserve vs Protected Forest, Rules, Punishment
priorities.minAnswer: Reserve Sec 3-27 + Protected Sec 29-34 + distinction table + state govt rules Sec 30-32 + penalties Sec 26
priorities.strategy: 75% — 'distinguish reserve and protected' is a guaranteed Sec C question.

priorities.topic: PIL & Judicial Activism — MC Mehta, Vellore Citizens, SC Role
priorities.minAnswer: PIL definition + MC Mehta 1987 (absolute liability) + Vellore Citizens (polluter pays) + Indian Council case (precautionary)

priorities.topic: Sustainable Development + International Treaties (Stockholm, Rio, Kyoto, Paris)
priorities.minAnswer: Define + Brundtland 1987 + Stockholm 1972 + Rio 1992 + Kyoto + Paris 2015 + Vellore Citizens case
priorities.strategy: Easy narrative — fill pages with conferences.

priorities.topic: EP Act 1986 — Rules, Central Govt Powers, Hazardous Wastes
priorities.minAnswer: Bhopal Gas background + Sec 3 powers + Sec 6 standards + Sec 15 penalties + Sec 19 cognizance

priorities.topic: CrPC Sec 133 / IPC Provisions for Environmental Pollution
priorities.minAnswer: CrPC 133 scope + IPC 268 (nuisance) + 277 (water) + 278 (atmosphere) + 284 (poisonous) + Ratlam case

priorities.topic: NGT — Constitution, Powers, Functions, Cases
priorities.minAnswer: NGT Act 2010 + composition + jurisdiction + powers + precautionary principle

goldenCases.name: MC Mehta v UOI (1987) — Oleum Gas Leak
goldenCases.principle: ABSOLUTE LIABILITY for hazardous industries — no exceptions, not even Act of God

goldenCases.name: Vellore Citizens v UOI (1996)
goldenCases.principle: Polluter Pays + Precautionary Principle formally adopted as Indian law

goldenCases.name: Indian Council v UOI (1996)
goldenCases.principle: Precautionary principle — burden of proof on industry to show safety

goldenCases.name: Municipal Council Ratlam v Vardhichand (1980)
goldenCases.principle: CrPC Sec 133 — magistrate can ORDER municipality to remove nuisance; 'no funds' is no defence

banking-law.name: Banking Law incl. NI Act
banking-law.oneLiner: Negotiable instruments, RBI functions, bank-customer relations & cheque dishonour

priorities.topic: Negotiable Instruments — Meaning, Kinds (PN, BoE, Cheque), Characteristics
priorities.minAnswer: Sec 13 definition + PN Sec 4 + BoE Sec 5 + Cheque Sec 6 + characteristics + distinction table
priorities.strategy: 100% — appeared every year. Free Sec A marks.

priorities.topic: RBI — Legal Status, Functions, Structure, Role, Inflation Control
priorities.minAnswer: RBI Act 1934 + structure + functions (monetary, regulatory, developmental, supervisory) + inflation tools (repo, CRR, SLR)

priorities.topic: Holder vs Holder in Due Course — Define, Distinguish, Privileges
priorities.minAnswer: Holder Sec 8 + HDC Sec 9 + distinction + privileges Sec 53, 120 + Bharat Barrel case

priorities.topic: Bill of Exchange — Define, Characteristics, Kinds, Distinction
priorities.minAnswer: Sec 5 definition + characteristics + inland/foreign + time/demand + distinction from cheque/PN

priorities.topic: Endorsement — Definition, Kinds, Forged Endorsement Effect
priorities.minAnswer: Sec 15 definition + blank/special/restrictive/conditional/partial + forged Sec 41-42 (title doesn't pass)

priorities.topic: Bank-Customer Relationship — Nature, Types, Duties
priorities.minAnswer: Debtor-creditor + bailor-bailee + agent-principal + trustee + bank duties + Syndicate Bank case

priorities.topic: FEMA — Salient Features, Foreign Exchange Management
priorities.minAnswer: Replaced FERA 1973 + objectives + features (current account free, capital regulated, civil penalties unlike FERA)

priorities.topic: Dishonour of Cheque — Sec 138, Essentials, Procedure, Penalty
priorities.minAnswer: Sec 138 elements + procedure (notice 30 days, complaint 1 month) + punishment (2 years + twice amount) + M/s Meters case
priorities.strategy: 3 consecutive recent years — important practical topic.

priorities.topic: Banking Evolution / Development in India — History
priorities.minAnswer: Presidency banks → Imperial Bank → SBI 1955 → nationalization 1969/1980 → liberalization → digital

priorities.topic: Paying/Collecting Banker — Duties, Liabilities, Protection (Sec 85-89)
priorities.minAnswer: Paying banker duties + Sec 85 protection + collecting banker duties + Sec 131 protection

goldenCases.name: Bharat Barrel v Amin Chand Payrelal (1999)
goldenCases.principle: Sec 118 presumption — every NI presumed for consideration, HDC gets clean title free from defects

goldenCases.name: Canara Bank v Canara Sales Corp (1987)
goldenCases.principle: Banker has general lien on all securities deposited; multi-layered bank-customer relationship

goldenCases.name: M/s Meters v Kanchan Mehta (2017)
goldenCases.principle: Sec 138 fast-track trial + compounding at any stage + use of technology for modern banking

adr.name: Arbitration, Conciliation & ADR
adr.oneLiner: Alternative dispute resolution — arbitration, conciliation, Lok Adalat & mediation
adr.practicalNote: Theory + Practical paper. 2019-2024: 100 marks theory. 2025 onwards: 50 marks theory + 50 practical (diary + viva)

priorities.topic: ADR System — Meaning, Nature, Importance, Various Techniques
priorities.minAnswer: Define ADR + list techniques (Arbitration, Conciliation, Mediation, Negotiation, Lok Adalat, Med-Arb, Medola) + importance

priorities.topic: Lok Adalat — Organisation, Jurisdiction, Powers, Settlement, Effectiveness
priorities.minAnswer: LSA Act 1987 Sec 19-22 + composition + jurisdiction + settlement (Sec 21 — deemed decree, no appeal) + effectiveness
priorities.strategy: 100% — always Sec B or C. Key: settlement is FINAL, non-appealable.

priorities.topic: Arbitral Award — Contents, Setting Aside Sec 34, Finality, Correction Sec 33
priorities.minAnswer: Sec 31 form/contents + Sec 33 correction (30 days) + Sec 34 grounds for setting aside (7 grounds) + ONGC case

priorities.topic: Conciliation — Conciliator Role, Settlement Agreement, vs Arbitration
priorities.minAnswer: Part III Sec 61-81 + conciliator Sec 64 + role Sec 67 + settlement Sec 73 + difference from arbitrator

priorities.topic: Types of Arbitration — Domestic, International, Foreign, Fast-Track
priorities.minAnswer: Domestic Sec 2(2) + International Sec 2(1)(f) + Foreign (Part II) + Fast-Track Sec 29B
priorities.strategy: 80% — free Sec A marks every year.

priorities.topic: Arbitrator Appointment — Sec 11, Types, Challenge Sec 12-13
priorities.minAnswer: Sec 11 procedure + Sec 12 challenge grounds + Sec 13 procedure + types (sole, panel)

priorities.topic: Arbitration & Conciliation Act 1996 — Objects, Salient Features
priorities.minAnswer: UNCITRAL Model Law base + objects (fast resolution, minimal court intervention) + key features

priorities.topic: Legal Services / Legal Aid — LSA Act 1987, Entitlement Sec 12
priorities.minAnswer: Art 39A + LSA Act + Sec 12 categories (SC/ST, women, children, mentally ill, income threshold) + NALSA

priorities.topic: Arbitration Agreement — Meaning, Essential Elements (Sec 7)
priorities.minAnswer: Sec 7 definition + essentials (in writing, signed, intention to arbitrate) + FCI v Joginderpal case

priorities.topic: Foreign Award — Geneva/NY Convention, Enforcement Conditions
priorities.minAnswer: Part II of Act + Geneva Convention + NY Convention + enforcement conditions

goldenCases.name: Afcons Infrastructure v Cherian Varkey (2010)
goldenCases.principle: SC guidelines for ADR referral under Sec 89 CPC — listed categories suitable for each ADR mode

goldenCases.name: ONGC v Saw Pipes Ltd (2003)
goldenCases.principle: Patent illegality as ground for setting aside award — expanded Sec 34 public policy

goldenCases.name: Guru Nanak Foundation v Rattan Singh (1981)
goldenCases.principle: Purpose of arbitration = speedy, inexpensive resolution — courts should not interfere

criminology.name: Criminology & Penology
criminology.oneLiner: Crime causation, schools of criminology, punishment theories & prison reform

priorities.topic: Schools of Criminology — Classical, Italian/Lombroso, Sociological, Clinical, Demonological, Tarde
priorities.minAnswer: 6 schools: Classical (Beccaria) + Italian/Positive (Lombroso, Ferri, Garofalo) + Sociological + Clinical + Demonological + Tarde's Imitation
priorities.strategy: 100% — at least one school appears every year.

priorities.topic: Criminology — Definition, Scope, Importance, Nature, Methods of Study
priorities.minAnswer: Define + scope (crime, criminal, behaviour, punishment, prevention) + importance + relation with penology & criminal law

priorities.topic: Capital Punishment — Constitutional Validity, Abolition vs Retention, SC Cases
priorities.minAnswer: Art 21 + Bachan Singh 1980 ('rarest of rare') + Machhi Singh 1983 (5 categories) + arguments for/against

priorities.topic: Prison System — Defects, Reform Suggestions, Open Prison, Borstal, Prison Labour
priorities.minAnswer: Defects (overcrowding, no classification, untrained staff) + reforms (open prisons, vocational training) + Mulla Committee 1983

priorities.topic: Parole / Probation / Furlough — Distinction, Merits, System, Parole Boards
priorities.minAnswer: Parole (temporary release) vs Probation (suspension, POA 1958) vs Furlough (earned leave) + distinction table

priorities.topic: Organised Crime — Meaning, Kinds (Drug Trafficking, Terrorism, Cybercrime)
priorities.minAnswer: Define + characteristics (hierarchical, violence, profit motive) + kinds (drugs, human trafficking, money laundering, cyber, terror)

priorities.topic: Theories of Punishment — Retributive, Deterrent, Preventive, Reformative
priorities.minAnswer: 5 theories: Retributive (eye for eye) + Deterrent (fear) + Preventive (disable) + Reformative (rehabilitate) + Expiatory (atone)

priorities.topic: White Collar Crime — Meaning, vs Traditional Crime, Causes, Least Detected
priorities.minAnswer: Sutherland coined 1939 + characteristics (respectable persons, occupation, breach of trust) + types (tax evasion, fraud, insider trading)

priorities.topic: Sutherland's Differential Association Theory
priorities.minAnswer: 9 propositions. Core: criminal behaviour is LEARNED through interaction. Favourable definitions exceed unfavourable.

priorities.topic: Juvenile Delinquency — Meaning, Causes, Clinical Services, Gateway to Crime
priorities.minAnswer: Define (under 18) + causes (broken home, poverty, peer pressure, media) + JJ Act 2015 + prevention

goldenCases.name: Bachan Singh v State of Punjab (1980)
goldenCases.principle: Rarest of rare doctrine + analysis of all punishment theories

goldenCases.name: Machhi Singh v State of Punjab (1983)
goldenCases.principle: 5 categories for rarest of rare — manner, motive, magnitude, victim, nature

goldenCases.name: Rattan Lal (1965) + Sunil Batra (1978)
goldenCases.principle: Probation over prison + prisoners retain Art 21 rights

trust-law.name: Law of Trust, Equity & Fiduciary Relation
trust-law.oneLiner: History, nature & principles of Equity, Trust creation, Trustee duties, Beneficiary rights
